roa.docketEntryComment: /X:PROBATION REMAINS REVOKED,//X:ON WRITTEN NOTICE FROM JAIL AFTERCARE, COURT WILL SIGN ORDER RELEASING DEFENDANT TO PROGRAM,/CONTD:FOR JAIL AFTERCARE PLACEMENT/X:DAW IF FAVORABLE,

/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REV//CTORD:THAT DEFENDANT BE SUPERVISED BY THE INTENSIVE SUPERVISION UNIT OF THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/REL:TO THE JAIL AFTERCARE PROGRAM WHEN BED BECOMES AVAILABLE/DEF:SHALL ENTER & COMPLETE THE PROGRAM//X:THE PURPOSE OF THE PROGRAM IS TO DETERMINE WHETHER DEFENDANT IS AMENABLETO PROBATION,/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS PROGRAM, DEFENDANT WILL BE SENTENCED ONREVOKED PROBATION, & SENTENCE WILL BE UP TO THE COURT,//X:IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL IN PROGRAM, COURT WILL REINSTATE PROBATION INOCTOBER & EXTEND IT TO 08-16-04,/CONTD:FOR PROGRESS REPORT FROM JAIL AFTERCARE/X:DAW IF FAVORABLE,/

/MIT/AJW/CH1:SP3Y:U:ESS:PROB 3Y:PJ1Y/CTS:200/CTW:50//REL:JAIL PSYCHIATRIC SERVICES//DEF:TO SERVE AND ADDITIONAL 1 YEAR STATE PRISON PER EACH ADDITIONAL PRIOR,FOR A TOTAL OF 5 YEARS STATE PRISON/STATES/COUN/ADPRS:667,5(B)PC, 23 DECEMBER, 1986; AND 459 PC, 6 MAY, 1994/SA2:MERRIOT HOTEL, SAN FRANCISCO/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/ACCEP/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:10-29-02/SHER/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DAWT/DA-MTR/SUPP:05-14-02/PROB ADM REV/SHER/
